positive: A majestic, stylized celestial fox spirit silhouette embracing the lunar cycle. The design features intricate line work, stylized foliage (willow branches, glowing bioluminescent moss), and abstract nebulae swirls surrounding a central, elegant fox figure. Use a highly graphic, minimalist ink-wash style with bold negative space contrast. The color palette should be deep indigo, ethereal cyan, gold metallic accents, and rich forest green. Central composition, perfect for a t-shirt print, vector art quality, clean lines, perfect symmetry, high contrast, flat graphic design, no photorealism.
